V-M-067.purpose: Verify Phase-49 BIMI sender-branding asset deployment across SVG compliance, frontend static delivery, nginx well-known routing, DNS instructions, and protected operational surfaces.
V-M-067.checks: BIMI Tiny P/S root attributes, file size, title/desc, absence of unsafe SVG constructs, frontend public asset copy, /.well-known/bimi allow-rule, image/svg+xml live headers, and unchanged deploy/install surfaces.

commands.command: python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/plans/Phase-49.xml docs/modules/M-067.xml docs/verification/V-M-067.xml docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml docs/verification-index.xml
git diff --name-only HEAD -- install.sh docker-compose.yml nginx deploy deploy/mtproto-de-compose.yml .env.example produces no output
curl -I https://krotpn.xyz/.well-known/bimi/krotpn.svg returns 200 and image/svg+xml after clean deploy
dig +short TXT default._bimi.krotpn.xyz @1.1.1.1 returns v=BIMI1 with l=https://krotpn.xyz/.well-known/bimi/krotpn.svg

module-checks.check-1: The SVG root includes version="1.2" and baseProfile="tiny-ps", and does not include root x or y attributes.
module-checks.check-2: The SVG stays below 32 kilobytes, remains square, and includes title plus desc.
module-checks.check-3: The SVG does not include script, animation, foreignObject, image, base64, style attributes, external href/xlink references, external http/https URLs outside the SVG namespace, or javascript URLs.
module-checks.check-4: frontend/nginx.conf has a specific /.well-known/bimi/ static location before the hidden-file deny location.
module-checks.check-5: Frontend build output includes dist/.well-known/bimi/krotpn.svg and does not rewrite it into the SPA HTML fallback.
module-checks.check-6: Phase-49 does not change Resend provider code, email token logic, install.sh, deploy scripts, docker-compose, TLS paths, VPN runtime, or MTProto runtime.
module-checks.check-7: DNS instructions publish default._bimi with the l= SVG URL and leave a= absent until VMC/CMC PEM material exists.

verification-levels.module-local: Static smoke covers SVG safety, file size, Tiny P/S attributes, and nginx route ordering.
verification-levels.wave-level: Frontend build covers asset inclusion and unchanged user frontend compile behavior.
verification-levels.phase-level: XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/install diff guard cover metadata integrity and operational isolation.
verification-levels.live-optional: Public curl and dig checks after a clean deploy prove the asset and DNS are reachable, while mailbox avatar rendering remains provider-controlled.

scenarios.scenario-1: Mailbox provider fetches default._bimi.krotpn.xyz, follows the l= URL, receives a BIMI-compliant SVG over HTTPS, and may render the KrotPN sender avatar.
scenarios.scenario-2: A browser request to https://krotpn.xyz/.well-known/bimi/krotpn.svg returns the SVG asset rather than the frontend app shell.
scenarios.scenario-3: Unrelated hidden paths remain denied by the frontend nginx hidden-file rule.
scenarios.scenario-4: SVG lacks tiny-ps/version attributes, exceeds 32 kilobytes, contains unsafe SVG constructs, or includes external references.
scenarios.scenario-5: /.well-known/bimi/krotpn.svg returns 403, 404, text/html, or the SPA fallback.
scenarios.scenario-6: Implementation changes install/deploy scripts, TLS material, Resend payload code, or email verification token behavior.

telemetry-requirements.requirement-1: No runtime telemetry is required because Phase-49 is static asset and DNS/runbook behavior.
telemetry-requirements.requirement-2: Smoke output may print aggregate pass/fail markers, SVG byte size, and route names; it must not print secrets, API keys, TLS private keys, email verification tokens, or user identifiers.

redaction-rules.rule-1: Do not log Resend API keys, verification/reset tokens, TLS private keys, MTProto secrets, VPN config bodies, Authorization headers, or live user identifiers during Phase-49 verification.

V-M-067.evidence: Phase-49 local verification passed: BIMI SVG smoke, frontend build, dist-copy smoke, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected deploy/install diff guard. Operator live curl and DNS publication remain after release deploy.
V-M-067.autonomous-execution-safety: Allowed after plan and verification approval because Phase-49 is limited to public static branding asset delivery, nginx well-known allowance, smoke verification, and DNS/runbook docs.
